title: Flowise account registration mass-assigns req.body, letting unauthenticated users join arbitrary organizations and set roles
description: The AccountController.register() handler in packages/server/src/enterprise/controllers/account.controller.ts passes the raw req.body directly into AccountService.register() with no allowlist or DTO validation. The service then maps the client-supplied JSON (user, organization, organizationUser, workspace, workspaceUser, role and metadata fields) straight onto internal domain entities and persists them. Because the endpoint POST /api/v1/account/register is unauthenticated, an attacker can supply server-managed fields (createdBy, updatedBy, createdDate, etc.) and, critically, a nested organization.id and organizationUser.{organizationId,roleId}, causing the newly created account to be associated with an existing organization the attacker does not belong to and assigned an arbitrary role, breaking multi-tenant trust boundaries.
